title: Blueberry Crumble
description: A delicious dessert featuring fresh blueberries topped with a crunchy crumble mixture. Perfect for warm weather.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the blueberries, granulated sugar, and Syrian (ground cinnamon).
Mix until the blueberries are evenly coated with the sugar and cinnamon.
Transfer the blueberry mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In another mixing bowl, combine the flour, cold unsalted butter, gooey (crushed), and crumble (crushed).
Mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the blueberry mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
